lemmas.primary_translation: inward movement / inclusion / reduction / joining / obtaining / beginning / penetration / achievement / time expression / inwardly / within

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke bevegelse til det indre av noe
definitions.translation: used to express movement to the inside of something

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at noe blir omsluttet, dekket eller lignende
definitions.translation: used to express that something is enclosed, covered, or similar

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at noe kommer med i en avis, bok eller lignende
definitions.translation: used to express that something is included in a newspaper, book, or similar

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at noe blir mindre i omfang
definitions.translation: used to express that something becomes smaller in scope

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at noen kommer med i en viss krets, gruppe eller lignende
definitions.translation: used to express that someone joins a certain circle, group, or similar
examples: melde seg inn i en forening
gå inn som medeier i firmaet

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at noen får tak i noe
definitions.translation: used to express that someone obtains something

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke en innledning eller begynnelse
definitions.translation: used to express an introduction or beginning

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at noe blir gjennomtrengt eller dekket med noe
definitions.translation: used to express that something is penetrated or covered with something

definitions.text: brukt for å uttrykke at noe eller noen oppnår en viss tilstand, dyktighet eller lignende
definitions.translation: used to express that something or someone achieves a certain state, skill
